Meet Your Doctor

Expert Care, Compassionate Hands

10+
Years of
Excellence
Chief Dentist

Dr. Rakesh

BDS, MDS – Apollo Dental Care, Patna

Dr. Rakesh brings over a decade of dedicated dental practice to Apollo Dental Clinic. Known for his gentle approach, precise technique, and commitment to patient comfort, he has transformed the smiles of thousands across Patna and Bihar.

With expertise in advanced procedures like root canal treatment, implants, and cosmetic dentistry, Dr. Rakesh ensures that every patient receives the highest standard of care in a warm, welcoming environment.

Advanced Certified in Implant Dentistry
Expert in Painless Root Canal Treatment
Specialist in Pediatric & Cosmetic Dentistry
Digital X-Ray & Modern Equipment
